name: pack-structure
description: Basic pack structure validation per pack.md Section 2

tests.name: valid_minimal_pack
tests.description: Minimal valid pack with manifest.json and artifacts/ directory

tests.name: valid_pack_with_attestations
tests.description: Valid pack with optional attestations directory

tests.name: missing_manifest
tests.description: Pack without manifest.json must be rejected

tests.name: missing_artifacts_directory
tests.description: Pack without artifacts/ directory must be rejected

tests.name: manifest_wrong_location
tests.description: manifest.json must be at archive root

tests.name: artifact_outside_artifacts_dir
tests.description: Artifacts must be stored under artifacts/ directory

tests.name: not_zip_format
tests.content: This is not a ZIP file
tests.description: File must be valid ZIP archive

zip64_requirements.name: zip64_required_for_large_files
zip64_requirements.description: Archive MUST use ZIP64 if any file exceeds 4GB or more than 65,535 entries
zip64_requirements.note: Not tested with actual 4GB files due to size constraints

metadata_handling.name: zip_metadata_ignored

tests.name: timestamps_ignored
tests.description: ZIP timestamps do not affect integrity verification

tests.name: comments_ignored
tests.description: ZIP comments do not affect integrity verification

tests.name: extra_fields_ignored
tests.description: ZIP extra fields do not affect integrity verification

metadata_handling.description: Only file paths and file bytes are authoritative

notes: Per pack.md Section 2: Pack MUST be ZIP archive with manifest.json at root and artifacts/ directory
